visualGoal: Make a first-time buyer internalize that the room costs as much as the sensor, then guide them to the right tier. Real launch-monitor, enclosure, mat, projector, and netting product proof throughout; no procedural art.

realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: Image file exists on disk but is NOT in verified-product-images.json, so it is text-only in the premium tier. Vision-verify it is the actual EYE XO2 and add to the verified list before promoting to a shotgrid/gearpick.
Image file exists on disk but is NOT in verified-product-images.json. Mentioned only in the luxury-tier aside; text-only until vision-verified and added to the verified list.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic finished home golf simulator bay at dusk, glowing fairway on a full-width impact screen, warm gold accent lighting on forest-green walls, a hitting mat with an open product-overlay space beside the tee for a real launch monitor, curator Nina Brooks standing to the side reviewing a tablet, no fake branded hardware, no fake UI, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, fake launch monitor, warped screen, impossible geometry, tiny unreadable text, procedural gradient art

infographicPrompts.title: What a golf simulator actually costs, all-in
content: Launch monitor is a SMALLER slice as tier rises

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult golf curator Nina Brooks in a clean finished home simulator bay, one hand gesturing at a hitting mat and screen, confident estimator energy, product overlay space beside her, practical not fantasy, 4:5 portrait.
